ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "theory_marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated for the theoretical component of the subject */,
  "practical_marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated for the practical component of the subject */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks for the subject combining both theory and practical */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the subject is worth */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the subject is offered */,
  "prerequisite_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of any prerequisite subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the subject */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the subject belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_prerequisite_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program (e.g., Bachelor of Pharmacy) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree awarded upon completion of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Brief description of admission requirements */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary discipline of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_program_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the subject is associated */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being offered in the program */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* The specific semester in which the subject is offered within the program */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subject is elective or required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_program_mapping_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_program_mapping_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., mid-term, final exam) */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation is conducted */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor conducting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the evaluation */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Percentage weightage of the evaluation in the total marks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, student) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to (nullable for students) */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the user is enrolled in (nullable for non-students) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
